command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = '' &ListShowingMessage; select @message = @message + 'loadEmployeeImage(this);' select @message as message return

&CheckDepartmentRight; declare @statusID varchar(32), @statusName nvarchar(512), @outWork varchar(32) select @statusID = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_tt_lam_viec' select @outWork = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_tt_nghi_viec' select @statusName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_ttnv) else rtrim(ten_ttnv2) end from hrdmttnv where ma_ttnv = @statusID select 'this._right = ' + rtrim(@rights) + ';this._statusID = ''' + isnull(@statusID, '') + ''';this._outWork = ''' + isnull(@outWork, '') + ''';this._statusName =''' + replace(replace(isnull(@statusName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';load$EmployeeForm(this);' as message return

#IF @@action = 'Edit' #THEN &CreateTicket; &CreateTicket2; declare @rkey varchar(32), @ho_ten nvarchar(256), @imageUrl varchar(4000) declare @dia_chi_ht_tinh varchar(33), @dia_chi_ht_quan varchar(33), @dia_chi_ht_xa varchar(33), @dia_chi_th_tru_tinh varchar(33), @dia_chi_th_tru_quan varchar(33), @dia_chi_th_tru_xa varchar(33), @que_quan_tinh varchar(33), @que_quan_quan varchar(33), @que_quan_xa varchar(33) declare @ten_dcht_quan nvarchar(512), @ten_dcht_xa nvarchar(512), @ten_dctt_quan nvarchar(512), @ten_dctt_xa nvarchar(512), @ten_qq_quan nvarchar(512), @ten_qq_xa nvarchar(512)
select @rkey = rkey from hreanh where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @ho_ten = ho_nv + space(1) + ten_nv , @dia_chi_ht_tinh = dia_chi_ht_tinh, @dia_chi_ht_quan = dia_chi_ht_quan, @dia_chi_ht_xa = dia_chi_ht_xa , @dia_chi_th_tru_tinh = dia_chi_th_tru_tinh, @dia_chi_th_tru_quan = dia_chi_th_tru_quan, @dia_chi_th_tru_xa = dia_chi_th_tru_xa , @que_quan_tinh = que_quan_tinh, @que_quan_quan = que_quan_quan, @que_quan_xa = que_quan_xa from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @ten_dcht_quan = ten_quan%l from hrdmquan where ma_quan = @dia_chi_ht_quan and ma_tinh = @dia_chi_ht_tinh select @ten_dcht_xa = ten_phuong%l from hrdmphuong where ma_phuong = @dia_chi_ht_xa and ma_quan = @dia_chi_ht_quan and ma_tinh = @dia_chi_ht_tinh select @ten_dctt_quan = ten_quan%l from hrdmquan where ma_quan = @dia_chi_th_tru_quan and ma_tinh = @dia_chi_th_tru_tinh select @ten_dctt_xa = ten_phuong%l from hrdmphuong where ma_phuong = @dia_chi_th_tru_xa and ma_quan = @dia_chi_th_tru_quan and ma_tinh = @dia_chi_th_tru_tinh select @ten_qq_quan = ten_quan%l from hrdmquan where ma_quan = @que_quan_quan and ma_tinh = @que_quan_tinh select @ten_qq_xa = ten_phuong%l from hrdmphuong where ma_phuong = @que_quan_xa and ma_quan = @que_quan_quan and ma_tinh = @que_quan_tinh
if isnull(@rkey, '') = '' select @imageUrl = '' else select @imageUrl = '../AppHandler/Image.ashx?t=show&k=' + @stt_rec + '&d=' + '@@appDatabaseName' + '&r=' + isnull(@rkey, '')
select @ticket as ticket, @ticket2 as ticket2, @rkey as rkey, @ho_ten as ho_ten, @imageUrl as imageurl , @ten_dcht_quan as ten_dcht_quan%l, @ten_dcht_xa as ten_dcht_xa%l, @ten_dctt_quan as ten_dctt_quan%l, @ten_dctt_xa as ten_dctt_xa%l, @ten_qq_quan as ten_qq_quan%l, @ten_qq_xa as ten_qq_xa%l return #END

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$conflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã nhân viên %s đã khai báo trong thông tin nhân viên.' else N'The employee %s already exists.' end select @$conflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số chứng minh nhân dân %s đã có trong thông tin nhân viên.' else N'The identity card %s already exists.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã nhân viên %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the employee ID %s. It has already been used.' end

&CheckOutWorkStatus;
declare @ticket varchar(32) select @ticket = lower(replace(newid(), '-', ''))
if exists(select * from @@table where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select '' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_nv)) as message, 'resetTicket(this, "' + @ticket + '", "ma_nv")' as script return end
if @cmnd_so <> '' and exists(select * from @@table where cmnd_so = @cmnd_so) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select '' as field, replace(@$conflict, '%s', rtrim(@cmnd_so)) as message, 'resetTicket(this, "' + @ticket + '", "cmnd_so")' as script return end
select @bp_ref = isnull(bp_ref, ''), @ma_dvcs = isnull(ma_dvcs, '') from hrbp where ma_bp = @bo_phan
declare @wsID varchar(8), @outWork varchar(32) select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where upper(name) = 'M_WS_ID' select @outWork = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_tt_nghi_viec' select @stt_rec = max(stt_rec) from hrnv select @stt_rec = @wsID + case when @stt_rec is null then '000000001' else replace(str(cast(substring(@stt_rec, 2, 9) as bigint) + 1, 9), ' ', '0') end + 'HRM'
if @tinh_trang_nv = @outWork select @status = '0' select @dia_chi_ht_phuong = ten_phuong from hrdmphuong where ma_phuong = @dia_chi_ht_xa select @dia_chi_th_tru_phuong = ten_phuong from hrdmphuong where ma_phuong = @dia_chi_th_tru_xa select @que_quan_phuong = ten_phuong from hrdmphuong where ma_phuong = @que_quan_xa select @dia_chi_ht = rtrim(@dia_chi_ht_so) + case when @dia_chi_ht_so <> '' and @dia_chi_ht_phuong <> '' then ' - ' else '' end + @dia_chi_ht_phuong, @dia_chi_th_tru = rtrim(@dia_chi_th_tru_so) + case when @dia_chi_th_tru_so <> '' and @dia_chi_th_tru_phuong <> '' then ' - ' else '' end + @dia_chi_th_tru_phuong, @que_quan = rtrim(@que_quan_so) + case when @que_quan_so <> '' and @que_quan_phuong <> '' then ' - ' else '' end + @que_quan_phuong, @ngay_hh_tv = case when @ngay_chinh_thuc is null then @ngay_nghi else case when @ngay_nghi is null then @ngay_chinh_thuc else case when @ngay_chinh_thuc > @ngay_nghi then @ngay_nghi else @ngay_chinh_thuc end end end, @bp_chinh_thuc0 = @bo_phan, @vt_chinh_thuc0 = @vi_tri, @ql_chinh_thuc0 = @bac_quan_ly, @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

declare @script nvarchar(4000), @invoke varchar(4000), @imageUrl varchar(4000), @fileTicket nvarchar(256) select @script = 'showViewPanelForm(this, true);', @invoke = '', @fileTicket = '' if (@$rkey <> '') begin select @imageUrl = '../AppHandler/Image.ashx?t=show&k=' + @stt_rec + '&d=' + '@@appDatabaseName' + '&r=' + @$rkey select @script = @script + 'setViewPanelImage(this, ' + '''' + @imageUrl + ''');' select @invoke = 'Image.Image.Process.SaveImage(' + rtrim(@$rkey) + ',' + rtrim(@stt_rec) + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + ')' end else select @script = 'showBlankImage(this);' + @script if (@$rkey2 <> '') begin select @invoke = 'Image.Image.Process.SaveFullImage(' + rtrim(@$rkey2) + ',' + rtrim(@stt_rec) + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + ')' + case when @invoke <> '' then '&' + char(255) + ';' else '' end + @invoke select @script = 'this.grid._fullImageKey=''' + @$rkey2 + ''';' + @script end
&ListCommand; &PostInserted; &ListQuery;, @stt_rec as stt_rec else select '' as message, '' as field, @stt_rec as stt_rec, @script as script return

&CheckOutWorkStatus;
if exists(select 1 from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay_nghi < @ngay_vao) begin select 'ngay_vao' as field, case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trường ngày vào công ty phải nhỏ hơn hoặc bằng ngày nghỉ.' else N'Invalid Join Date.' end as message return end if exists(select 1 from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay_nghi < @ngay_chinh_thuc and @ngay_chinh_thuc is not null) begin select 'ngay_chinh_thuc' as field, case when @@language = 'v' then N'Trường ngày vào chính thức phải nhỏ hơn hoặc bằng ngày nghỉ.' else N'Invalid Official Hire Date.' end as message return end
declare @eid varchar(32), @idc varchar(32), @ticket varchar(32) select @ticket = lower(replace(newid(), '-', '')) select @eid = ma_nv, @idc = cmnd_so from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec
if @ma_nv <> @eid begin if exists(select * from @@table where ma_nv = @ma_nv and stt_rec <> @stt_rec) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select '' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_nv)) as message, 'resetTicket(this, "' + @ticket + '", "ma_nv")' as script return end end
if @cmnd_so <> '' and @cmnd_so <> @idc begin if exists(select * from @@table where cmnd_so = @cmnd_so and stt_rec <> @stt_rec) begin insert into @@sysDatabaseName..ticket(ticket, user_id, data, datetime0) values(@ticket, @@userID, '@@appDatabaseName', getdate()) select '' as field, replace(@$conflict, '%s', rtrim(@cmnd_so)) as message, 'resetTicket(this, "' + @ticket + '", "cmnd_so")' as script return end end
declare @outWork varchar(32) select @outWork = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_tt_nghi_viec' if (@tinh_trang_nv = @outWork) select @status = '0' else select @status = '1' update @@table set status = @status where stt_rec = @stt_rec

update @@table set bp_ref = b.bp_ref, ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs from @@table a join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp where stt_rec = @stt_rec update @@table set dia_chi_ht_phuong = isnull(b.ten_phuong, '') from @@table a left join hrdmphuong b on a.dia_chi_ht_xa = b.ma_phuong update @@table set dia_chi_th_tru_phuong = isnull(b.ten_phuong, '') from @@table a left join hrdmphuong b on a.dia_chi_th_tru_xa = b.ma_phuong update @@table set que_quan_phuong = isnull(b.ten_phuong, '') from @@table a left join hrdmphuong b on a.que_quan_xa = b.ma_phuong update @@table set dia_chi_ht = rtrim(dia_chi_ht_so) + case when dia_chi_ht_so <> '' and dia_chi_ht_phuong <> '' then ' - ' else '' end + dia_chi_ht_phuong, dia_chi_th_tru = rtrim(dia_chi_th_tru_so) + case when dia_chi_th_tru_so <> '' and dia_chi_th_tru_phuong <> '' then ' - ' else '' end + dia_chi_th_tru_phuong, que_quan = rtrim(que_quan_so) + case when que_quan_so <> '' and que_quan_phuong <> '' then ' - ' else '' end + que_quan_phuong, ngay_hh_tv = case when ngay_chinh_thuc is null then ngay_nghi else case when ngay_nghi is null then ngay_chinh_thuc else case when ngay_chinh_thuc > ngay_nghi then ngay_nghi else ngay_chinh_thuc end end end, bp_chinh_thuc0 = bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = bac_quan_ly, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec
if @ngay_chinh_thuc is not null begin update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = b.bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = b.vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = b.bac_quan_ly from hrnv a join (select a.stt_rec, a.bo_phan, a.vi_tri, a.bac_quan_ly from hreqtlvht a join (select a.stt_rec, max(a.ngay_tu) as ngay_tu from hreqtlvht a join hrnv b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec and a.tinh_chat = '1' and a.ngay_tu <= b.ngay_chinh_thuc group by a.stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ngay_tu = b.ngay_tu) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec end
declare @script nvarchar(4000), @invoke varchar(4000), @imageUrl varchar(4000), @fileTicket nvarchar(256) select @script = 'showViewPanelForm(this, false);', @invoke = '', @fileTicket = '' if (@$rkey <> '') begin select @imageUrl = '../AppHandler/Image.ashx?t=show&k=' + @stt_rec + '&d=' + '@@appDatabaseName' + '&r=' + @$rkey select @script = @script + 'setViewPanelImage(this,' + '''' + @imageUrl + ''');' select @invoke = 'Image.Image.Process.SaveImage(' + rtrim(@$rkey) + ',' + rtrim(@stt_rec) + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + ')' end if (@$rkey2 <> '') begin select @invoke = 'Image.Image.Process.SaveFullImage(' + rtrim(@$rkey2) + ',' + rtrim(@stt_rec) + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + ')' + case when @invoke <> '' then '&' + char(255) + ';' else '' end + @invoke select @script = 'this.grid._fullImageKey=''' + @$rkey2 + ''';' + @script end
&ListCommand; &ListQuery;, @stt_rec as stt_rec else select '' as message, '' as field, @stt_rec as stt_rec, @script as script return

declare @employeeID varchar(33), @message nvarchar(512) select @employeeID = ma_nv from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @message = replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@employeeID))
if exists(select * from hrttchamcong where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @message as message return end
if exists(select * from hrttluong where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @message as message return end
if exists(select * from hrcthd where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @message as message return end
if exists(select * from hrttbh where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @message as message return end

delete hreanh where stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hreanh2 where stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @c nvarchar(512), @t varchar(32) select @t = '', @c = 'delete %t% where stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' select distinct table_name into #t from @@sysDatabaseName..hrtabinfo where table_del_yn = 1 while exists(select 1 from #t) begin select top 1 @t = table_name from #t order by table_name set @q = replace(@c, '%t%', @t) exec sp_executesql @q delete #t where table_name = @t end drop table #t
if exists(select 1 from sysobjects where name = 'hrrmqdtd' and type = 'U') delete hrrmqdtd where stt_rec_nv = @stt_rec
declare @invoke nvarchar(4000) select @invoke = '' &ListDeleted; &PostDeleted; select @invoke as invoke
